title: SwarmKit InstanceState
description: The full observed state of a swarmkit instance — every artifact's content, not just names (unlike the cheap names-only /capabilities probe). Returned by serve `GET /fleet/state` and rides along in register/join; a fleet caches it so the instance stays inspectable offline. See design details/control-plane/19-fleet-enrollment-protocol.md (§InstanceState).

schema_version.description: swarmkit-schema version the instance validates against (compat gate).

artifacts.description: Per-kind arrays of the instance's artifacts, each with content + a content hash.

providers.description: Model-provider ids configured on the instance.

governance_provider.description: The governance provider in force (e.g. mock, agt).

health.description: Liveness summary — at least a status field.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonicalised content — matches the fleet artifact registry's hash so an adopted artifact lines up.

content.description: The artifact's full content (the parsed YAML), as an object.
